nextId.descr: Next agent id to mint. 0 is invalid/zero-address, so minting starts at 1.

supply.descr: Number of live agent NFTs. No burn method exists in this MVP, so this is also minted count.

methods.name: register
methods.desc: register(agentURI, metadata) -> agentId. Mints to Txn.sender and sets agentWallet=Txn.sender.

methods.name: setAgentURI
methods.desc: setAgentURI(id, uri). Callable by owner or approved operator.

methods.name: setMetadata
methods.desc: setMetadata(id, key, value). Reserved key `agentWallet` is written through setAgentWallet only.

methods.name: setAgentWallet
methods.desc: setAgentWallet(id, wallet). Owner/operator assertion is the MVP verification seam.

methods.name: unsetAgentWallet
methods.desc: unsetAgentWallet(id). Clears the reserved wallet pointer.

methods.name: arc72_ownerOf
methods.desc: arc72_ownerOf(uint256) -> address. Invalid token ids return zero address per ARC-72.

methods.name: arc72_transferFrom
methods.desc: arc72_transferFrom(from, to, tokenId). Clears single approval + agentWallet on transfer.

methods.name: arc72_approve
methods.desc: arc72_approve(approved, tokenId). Zero address revokes the single-token approval.

methods.name: arc72_tokenURI
methods.desc: ARC-72 metadata extension: fixed byte[256] token URI, zero-padded.

methods.name: getAgentURI
methods.desc: ERC-8004-friendly string URI read; use this for the full agent registration URI.

methods.name: getAgentWallet
methods.desc: getAgentWallet(id) -> address, or zero address if unset.
